_comment: Example Job that runs the strict silver projection (notebook 02) on a schedule. If bronze contains a v2 payload key that the projection doesn't account for, the job *still succeeds* — VARIANT projection is lenient. To make the job FAIL on drift (and thus trigger email_notifications.on_failure), add the 'strict' guard task below: it queries the drift view and FAILs the run if any unknown keys exist. Wire it up via: Jobs UI → Create Job → paste this JSON into the YAML/JSON editor, OR use 'databricks jobs create --json @jobs/strict_silver_job.json'.
name: hockey-strict-silver

tasks.description: Fails the run if bronze contains payload keys not in the allow-list — turns schema drift into a Job failure that fires email_notifications.on_failure.

webhook_notifications._comment: Optional: add Slack/PagerDuty/MS Teams via Account-level webhook destinations, then reference their IDs here.
